doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core statutory language for 735 ILCS 5/9-209 closely matches the real Illinois statute, but the email service clause and editorial framing appear to be non-statutory additions not found in the official text.
